offer: For construction contractors processing 5–15 projects/month, delays in permit submissions cause project hold-ups. We automate the submission process instead of manual submission of permits through various channels.
problem: Delays in permit submissions lead to project hold-ups and increased costs.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for construction contractors
Indie Hackers discussions on similar workflows
DM outreach to construction contractors with demo video
Community forums for sharing construction tools
try_it: Let users try status tracking for permits and manual invoice entry
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with one-liner and CTA
Produce a demo video of the manual workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: CSV import for existing project data
Streamline onboarding steps for new users
